[gold]Transform[/gold] all Attack cards in all players' [gold]hands[/gold] into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Giant Rock+[/gold]|[gold]Giant Rock[/gold]}.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_GENEROUS_DONATION: Choose {IfUpgraded:show:any|a} card from your [gold]hand[/gold], then put it into a teammate's [gold]hand[/gold].
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_THREE_LEGGED_RACE: Designate another player. You and they each draw {Cards:diff()} cards. This turn, whenever they/you gain/use Energy, you/they draw/discard that many cards.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_BURN_THE_MOUNTAIN: All cards played by all players are [gold]Exhausted[/gold]. Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}random card of a different character to the hand.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_PING_PONG.title: Ping Pong
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_PING_PONG.descrip: This turn, whenever another player plays a card that costs 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, play the animation of {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Bouncing Flask+[/gold]|[gold]Bouncing Flask[/gold]} once.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_BEE_BRO_ON_THE_RU: Apply 1 [gold]Personal Hive[/gold] and 10 [gold]Slow[/gold] to all enemies.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_CURSED_HANDKERCHI:
You must play this card first.
When a player plays 7 cards in a single turn, this card costs 1 more this turn and is put into their hand.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_FIND_SOMEONE_TO_G:
{IfUpgraded:show:At the start of your turn, move to hand.
|}This turn, a teammate gains: each time the same card is played, add a [gold]Human[/gold] to hand.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_HUMAN.title: Human
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_COUPLING.title: Coupling
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_COUPLING.descript: Whenever you [blue]Evoke[/blue] an orb, trigger the passive of all remaining orbs.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_PRESS_FORWARD.des: Upgrade your [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold]. Whenever [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] is in your hand, you must [gold]play[/gold] it first.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_LIKE_SHADOW.title: Like Shadow
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_LIKE_SHADOW.descr: [gold]Play[/gold] the last card that entered the [gold]discard pile[/gold].
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_AGITATION.title: Agitation
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_AGITATION.descrip: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. This turn, you can only play the highest-cost card.
THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_CARD_VAKUU_TEACHES_U_T: If you play cards from left to right in any turn, [gold]retain[/gold] all your [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]hand[/gold] that turn.
